category_sources: source_facts.description says veraPDF is an open-source PDF/A validation tool; official docs at docs.verapdf.org cover CLI validation.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage uses veraPDF branding; source_facts.homepage=https://verapdf.org/home.
docs_sources: Dedicated official documentation domain docs.verapdf.org includes getting started and CLI quick start pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/veraPDF/veraPDF-apps; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PDF/A validation; source_facts.executables lists CLI tools verapdf and verapdf-gui.
